title: NPL - National Physical Laboratory - Building 42
notes:
Clean & Disinfect CWSTs - CONFINED SPACE

NPL - National Physical Laboratory - Building 42

To attend site and carry out a clean and disinfect Laboratory CWST, and the Large Holding Tank. Holding Tank is a confined space tank clean

To drain, clean and disinfect cold water storage tank(s) only, inside normal hours, to L8, HSG274 and BS8558, including condition report. Works will include post cleaning contact spray disinfection of the tank internals using BPR registered Silver Hydrogen Peroxide for 1 hour. Tank to be refilled with fresh water, checked for residual Hydrogen Peroxide, and returned to service.

title: NPL - National Physical Laboratory - Building 38
notes:
Clean and Disinfect CWSTs

NPL - National Physical Laboratory - Building 38

To attend site to clean and disinfect CWSTs - confined space cleaning. 

CONFINED SPACE WORKING 

To drain, clean and disinfect cold water storage tank(s) only,

Works will include post cleaning contact spray disinfection of the tank internals using BPR registered Silver Hydrogen Peroxide for 1 hour. Tank to be refilled with fresh water, checked for residual Hydrogen Peroxide, and returned to service.

5 x Sanosil Super 25 Ag - 10 litre container - Silver Hydrogen Peroxide.Safe for all systems including drinking water.
1 x EndoSan Test Strips - 0-1000 ppm. Tub of 100 strips.

title: CBP - Rosewood
notes:
LTHW Dosing

**chem in unit**

Via fitted dosing pot

Remove and return empty drums to unit

4 x Hy-Closehib-MAP-DILUTE 20 (11.9L) - Closed System Corrosion Inhibitor - blend of Alkanolamine, Azole, Co-polymer, Molybdate, Phosphonate corrosion inhibitors. Suitable for Multi-metal Systems including Aluminium and Zinc. Target >250mg/l as MoO4. 1% system volume dose rate option. Supplied in 12.5kg(11.9L) drums
